LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANTS CAMERON BRYCE AND BRYCE CB CONSTRUCTION INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT RELIES SOLELY ON THE DECLARATION OF COUNSEL (MR. ANDERSON) TO OBTAIN RELIEF. THAT DECLARATION FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE DEFAULT WAS OBTAINED DUE TO MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302/EHG)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-15-2015 Vacated

Off Calendar Jan-22-2015 Set For Trial On Dec-07-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2014 Continued To Feb-04-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Dec-12-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS CAMERON BRYCE, BRYCE CB CONSTRUCTION INC.'s MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is Off calendar per the December 9, 2014 ex parte order and stipulation setting aside the default. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-25-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KEITH M. VELLECA, TEL. NO. 293-8048 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CAMERON BRYCE AND BRYCE CB CONSTRUCTION INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT is denied. Defendant relies solely on the declaration of counsel (Mr. Anderson) to obtain relief. That declaration fails to show that the default was obtained due to mistake, inadvertence, or excusable neglect. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Continued To Nov-25-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS CAMERON BRYCE AND BRYCE CB CONSTRUCTION INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT is continued on the Court's own motion to November 25, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/eg
